name: Pumkincookies
recipeIngredient: 1 can Pure Pumpkin, solid, packed (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Grease cookie sheets.
3. Cream butter and sugar together until light and fluffy.
4. Add egg, vanilla extract, and pumpkin; beat well.
5. Gradually add dry ingredients (flour mixture) one cup at a time, mixing after each addition.
6. Stir in chocolate chips, raisins, chopped nuts, and M&Ms.
7. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto prepared cookie sheets, leaving space between cookies as they will spread during baking.
8. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until firm and lightly golden brown.
9. Remove from cookie sheets to cool on wire racks.
10. Decorate with M&Ms immediately or drizzle with lemon glaze: mix powdered sugar, grated lemon peel, and lemon juice; glaze cookies or decorate with jelly beans for children.
